text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: The day is finally here! Sure took its time!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
My last race was downright pathetic. So, this is
my shot at clearin' my name!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna slip up twice! All right, let's get this
rumble started!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! This time 'round, I'll be blowin' up like
never before on the grand stage! Just wait and
see!
